name: cp-nice-player
description: Audio player for local files with optional FFmpeg fallback for unsupported formats.

cp-nice-player.ffmpegPath.description: Optional path to the ffmpeg executable. Leave empty to use ffmpeg from PATH. FFmpeg is only required for cache/stream fallback when native playback fails.

enumDescriptions: Transcode to a cached audio file (FLAC or OGG) and play that when native playback fails.
Serve adaptive streaming (HLS/DASH) when native playback fails.
cp-nice-player.unsupportedPlayback.description: How to play media the browser cannot decode natively. Requires FFmpeg. Cache mode transcodes to FLAC or OGG; stream mode is not yet implemented.

enumDescriptions: Ogg Vorbis; use playbackCache.oggQuality to tune quality.
cp-nice-player.playbackCache.format.description: Output format for cache transcode fallback. Only used when unsupportedPlayback is cache.

cp-nice-player.playbackCache.oggQuality.description: libvorbis quality (FFmpeg -q:a) when playbackCache.format is ogg. Higher values mean better quality and larger files.

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
